mapper.sql: authorization_id, package_id, electorate_item_id, tenant_id, principal_opid, principal_uid, agent_name_cipher, agent_identity_document_type, agent_identity_number_cipher, valid_from, valid_until, document_object_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, etag, content_sha256, authorization_hash, status, registered_by_user_id, registered_at, reviewed_by_user_id, reviewed_at, review_note, revoked_by_user_id, revoked_at, revoke_reason, version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_voting_proxy_authorization ( package_id, electorate_item_id, tenant_id, principal_opid, principal_uid, agent_name_cipher, agent_identity_document_type, agent_identity_number_cipher, valid_from, valid_until, document_object_key, original_file_name, content_type, file_size, etag, content_sha256, authorization_hash, status, registered_by_user_id, registered_at ) VALUES ( #{packageId}, #{electorateItemId}, #{tenantId}, #{principalOpid}, #{principalUid}, #{agentName,typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, #{agentIdentityDocumentType}, #{agentIdentityNumber,typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, #{documentObjectKey}, #{originalFileName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{etag}, #{contentSha256}, #{authorizationHash}, #{status}, #{registeredByUserId}, #{registeredAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_voting_proxy_authorization WHERE package_id = #{packageId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY registered_at DESC, authorization_id DESC
